g.text: Traverse the list and while traversing maintain the previous node address until we found the Node to be deleted.

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: 1) Upon locating the node to be deleted,

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: 2) change the next pointer previous node's -> next to node to be deleted

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: 3) Also change the previous pointer of next to node to be deleted -> previous node's
